first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications and strengths are substantively the same, focusing on the candidate's extensive experience, core stack alignment, and testing expertise. The concerns are also parallel, with slight rephrasing or focusing on different secondary technologies from the resume (e.g., DLang/Ember.js vs. Java/C++). These differences are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not suggest any bias based on the name change.
